steps.title: Distribute the fraction across the parentheses
Combine the x terms and identify the slope
steps.content:
Rewrite $7x$ with denominator 4 so we can add it to $\frac{27x}{4}$:
$$7x = \frac{28x}{4}$$
Combine the $x$ terms:
$$\frac{27x}{4} + \frac{28x}{4} = \frac{55x}{4}$$
So $y = \frac{55x}{4} + \frac{15}{4}$. In slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$, the slope is the coefficient of $x$: 13.75.
